prompt:
Generate a full-body, front-view portrait of character protagonist based on the following description, with a pure white background. The character should be centered in the image, occupying most of the frame. Gazing straight ahead. Standing with arms relaxed at sides. Natural expression.
Features: A handsome young male investigator named Tsukasa Kamishiro, full-body character design, standing centered on pure white background. He has sharp, striking deep blue short hair styled neatly, with piercing intelligent eyes that convey a calm and analytical demeanor. His facial features are refined and attractive with fair skin, sharp jawline, and a composed, serious expression that reflects his high intelligence and investigative nature. He wears a sleek black investigator uniform with clean lines and professional tailoring that emphasizes his tall, lean physique. On his chest is a distinctive NERV special investigation badge, and his left hand is equipped with a high-tech data analysis glove with subtle technological details. His posture is confident and alert, embodying both physical capability and intellectual prowess. The character design follows Japanese anime style with vibrant colors and clean lineart, capturing the serious, mystery-solving atmosphere of the Neon Genesis Evangelion universe. His overall appearance radiates charisma, competence, and the focused intensity of someone uncovering hidden truths. Full-body shot, anime art style, no text, no symbols, no words., full body, standing pose, arms relaxed at sides, pure white background, character centered, no text, no symbols, no garbled characters, no words
Style: anime
No text, no symbols, no watermark, no garbled characters, no words.
